name: Thai Cucumber Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons round, thin red chile slices (with seeds)
2 heaping tablespoons dried shrimp, ground to a powder in a mortar or food processor (should be 2 tablespoons powder)
1/4 cup crushed roasted or fried peanuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the cucumbers and cut off the ends. Cut them in half lengthwise, scrape out the seeds, then slice thinly into half moons.
2. Add the sliced cucumbers to a bowl with the chiles, onion, ground shrimp, lime juice, fish sauce, sugar, and peanut oil. Toss well.
3. Allow the salad to sit or serve immediately sprinkled with the crushed peanuts.
